batch.faq.description: Everything you need to know about batch image processing.
batch.faq.export.answer: Yes. Export the whole batch as CSV or JSON — each row includes the filename, description, file size, type, and last-modified date, ready to paste into a CMS or spreadsheet.
batch.faq.export.question: Can I export all results at once?
batch.faq.free.answer: Yes. Batch processing is included in the free daily quota — each image counts as one generation. Signed-in users and Pro plans get higher limits.
batch.faq.free.question: Is batch processing free?
batch.faq.languages.answer: Yes. Pick your output language before generating and every image in the batch is described in that language.
batch.faq.languages.question: Can a whole batch be described in another language?
batch.faq.limit.answer: You can upload up to 9 images per batch, each up to 20 MB, in JPG, PNG, or WebP format. Run as many batches as your daily quota allows.
batch.faq.limit.question: How many images can I process at once?
batch.faq.title: Batch Processing FAQ
batch.faq.what.answer: It's a way to describe many images in one go. Upload a batch, choose a preset — descriptions, captions, OCR, or AI prompts — and every image is processed with the same instruction, streamed back one by one.
batch.faq.what.question: What is batch image description?
batch.hero.headline: Describe Images in Bulk with AI
batch.hero.subheadline: Upload up to 9 images at once and generate descriptions, captions, alt text, or prompts for all of them — then export everything in one click.
batch.how.description: Three steps from a folder of images to a finished spreadsheet.
batch.how.steps.export.text: Copy everything at once, or export the batch as CSV or JSON with filenames and metadata included.
batch.how.steps.export.title: Copy or export everything
batch.how.steps.process.text: Pick a preset — description, caption, OCR, or AI prompt — and each image streams back its own result with its own status.
batch.how.steps.process.title: Process the whole batch
batch.how.steps.upload.text: Drag in up to 9 images at once — JPG, PNG, or WebP, up to 20 MB each. Add more or remove stragglers before generating.
batch.how.steps.upload.title: Upload a whole batch
batch.how.title: How Batch Processing Works
batch.meta.description: Batch image description tool. Upload up to 9 images and generate descriptions, captions, alt text, or AI prompts for all of them at once. Free, no sign-up.
batch.meta.title: Batch Image Description – Bulk AI Image Describer | aiimagedescriber.io
batch.tool.description: Upload up to 9 images, pick any preset, and get a result for every image — then copy or export the whole batch.
batch.tool.tip: Tip: use the export button to download the whole batch as CSV or JSON for alt-text and metadata workflows.

extractText.faq.batch.answer: Yes. Upload up to 9 images at a time; each gets its own extracted text, and you can copy or export everything together as CSV or JSON.
extractText.faq.batch.question: Can I extract text from multiple images at once?
extractText.faq.description: Everything you need to know about OCR and text extraction.
extractText.faq.free.answer: Yes. You can extract text for free every day without creating an account. Signed-in users get a higher daily quota.
extractText.faq.free.question: Is extracting text from pictures free?
extractText.faq.handwriting.answer: Clear handwriting is usually recognized well, but results vary with legibility. Printed text gives the most accurate output.
extractText.faq.handwriting.question: Can it read handwritten text?
extractText.faq.languages.answer: The AI reads text in dozens of languages, including English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and major European languages — even when several appear in the same image.
extractText.faq.languages.question: Which languages can it recognize?
extractText.faq.title: Extract Text from Picture FAQ
extractText.faq.what.answer: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) is technology that reads text inside images — screenshots, scans, photos of documents — and converts it into editable, copyable text.
extractText.faq.what.question: What is OCR (text extraction)?
extractText.hero.headline: Extract Text From Any Picture
extractText.hero.subheadline: Upload a screenshot, photo, or scanned document and let AI pull out the text — accurate, well-formatted, and ready to copy.
extractText.how.description: Three steps from picture to copy-ready text.
extractText.how.steps.copy.text: Copy the extracted text in one click, or export results from a whole batch as CSV or JSON.
extractText.how.steps.copy.title: Copy or export
extractText.how.steps.extract.text: The OCR engine detects every text region and transcribes it, preserving line breaks and layout.
extractText.how.steps.extract.title: Let the AI read it
extractText.how.steps.upload.text: Drag in a JPG, PNG, or WebP — screenshots, scanned documents, receipts, or photos of signs all work.
extractText.how.steps.upload.title: Upload your picture
extractText.how.title: How to Extract Text from a Picture
extractText.meta.description: Free OCR tool to extract text from pictures. Upload a JPG, PNG, or WebP and copy clean, accurate text in seconds. No sign-up required.
extractText.meta.title: Extract Text from Picture – Free Online OCR | aiimagedescriber.io
extractText.tool.description: Upload one image or a batch. The AI reads every word it can find and keeps the original line breaks and layout.
extractText.tool.tip: Tip: sharp, high-contrast images with clearly visible text give the most accurate results.
extractText.tool.title: Picture to Text Converter
imageToPrompt.faq.batch.answer: Yes. You can upload up to 9 images at once and each one gets its own prompt. All results can be copied or exported together.
imageToPrompt.faq.batch.question: Can I convert multiple images to prompts at once?
imageToPrompt.faq.description: Everything you need to know about turning images into prompts.
imageToPrompt.faq.formats.answer: We offer dedicated presets for Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and Flux, plus a general prompt that works with DALL·E, Ideogram, and most other text-to-image models.
imageToPrompt.faq.formats.question: Which AI generators are the prompts compatible with?
imageToPrompt.faq.free.answer: Yes. You can generate prompts for free every day without creating an account. Signed-in users get a higher daily quota.
imageToPrompt.faq.free.question: Is the image to prompt tool free?
imageToPrompt.faq.languages.answer: Yes. Choose your preferred output language before generating — we support English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and more.
imageToPrompt.faq.languages.question: Can I get the prompt in other languages?
imageToPrompt.faq.title: Image to Prompt FAQ
imageToPrompt.faq.what.answer: It's an AI tool that analyzes an image and writes a text prompt describing its subject, composition, style, lighting, and mood — so you can recreate similar images with AI image generators like Midjourney or Stable Diffusion.
imageToPrompt.faq.what.question: What is an image to prompt generator?
imageToPrompt.hero.headline: Turn Any Image Into an AI Prompt
imageToPrompt.hero.subheadline: Upload an image and instantly reverse-engineer a detailed prompt for Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Flux, and other AI image generators.
imageToPrompt.how.description: Three steps from image to a production-ready prompt.
imageToPrompt.how.steps.copy.text: Copy the generated prompt into your favorite image generator and recreate or iterate on the style.
imageToPrompt.how.steps.copy.title: Copy and create
imageToPrompt.how.steps.generate.text: Pick General, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, or Flux. The AI analyzes subject, composition, lighting, and style.
imageToPrompt.how.steps.generate.title: Choose a prompt style
imageToPrompt.how.steps.upload.text: Drag in a JPG, PNG, or WebP — artwork, photos, or AI-generated images all work.
imageToPrompt.how.steps.upload.title: Upload your image
imageToPrompt.how.title: How Image to Prompt Works
imageToPrompt.meta.description: Free image to prompt generator. Upload any image and get ready-to-use prompts for Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and Flux. No sign-up required.
imageToPrompt.meta.title: Image to Prompt – Free AI Image to Prompt Generator | aiimagedescriber.io
imageToPrompt.tool.description: Upload one image or a batch, pick a prompt style — general, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, or Flux — and get a clean, copy-ready prompt in seconds.
imageToPrompt.tool.tip: Tip: switch between prompt presets to compare styles, then copy the one that fits your generator.

landing.cta.headline: Turn images into useful text
landing.cta.subheadline: Upload an image and get descriptions, captions, alt text, image prompts, and OCR text in seconds — free, no login required.
landing.description: aiimagedescriber.io—free online AI image describer. Generate descriptions, captions & alt text in seconds. Also supports image-to-prompt and OCR. No login.
landing.faq.accuracy.answer:
For the best descriptions:
- Use clear, well-lit images.
- Avoid images with heavy watermarks or extreme blur.
- Use the Custom Prompt (if available) to tell the AI to focus on specific details like "colors" or "textures."
landing.faq.accuracy.question: How do I get the most accurate results?
landing.faq.ai_prompts.answer: Absolutely. This is a popular feature among our users. By analyzing the style, composition, and lighting of an uploaded image, the AI provides a text-based prompt that helps you recreate similar aesthetics in AI art generators.
landing.faq.ai_prompts.question: Can it generate Midjourney or Stable Diffusion prompts?
landing.faq.commercial.answer: Yes. You have full rights to the text descriptions generated by our tool. You can use them for your business, shop, or any commercial project. Please ensure you have the necessary rights to the original image you upload.
landing.faq.commercial.question: Can I use the generated text commercially?
landing.faq.description: Find answers to common questions about how our tool works, privacy, and how to get the best results.
landing.faq.feedback.answer: We are constantly improving the tool! You can reach out use the contact link in the footer. We appreciate every suggestion from our users.
landing.faq.feedback.question: How can I provide feedback or report a bug?
landing.faq.formats.answer: We support all standard formats, including JPG, PNG, WEBP, BMP, and HEIC. For the best performance and speed, we recommend keeping file sizes under 20MB.
landing.faq.formats.question: Which image formats and sizes are supported?
landing.faq.free.answer:
Yes, you can start for free.
We offer daily free usage to help you get your tasks done. There are no hidden fees or complex subscriptions required to access the core features. No account required. No login required.
landing.faq.free.question: Is it free to use?
landing.faq.languages.answer: The tool is globally accessible and supports 14 languages, including English, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Spanish, French, Japanese, German, and more.
landing.faq.languages.question: What languages are supported?
landing.faq.privacy.answer: We take data security seriously. Your images are transmitted via encrypted (SSL) connections and are not stored permanently. We process the images solely to generate the description and do not share your data with third parties.
landing.faq.privacy.question: How is my privacy handled?
landing.faq.title: FAQ (AI Image Describer)
landing.faq.use_cases.answer:
Our users typically utilize the tool for:
- SEO & Accessibility: Generating descriptive Alt Text for website images.
- Content Creation: Crafting quick captions for Instagram, Pinterest, or blogs.
- AI Art Engineering: Reversing images into prompts for Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, or DALL-E.
- Front-end Development: Analyzing UI screenshots and layouts to provide structural descriptions for coding (For example: HTML/CSS...).
- Organization: Tagging and categorizing large image libraries.
landing.faq.use_cases.question: What are the most common use cases?
landing.faq.what.answer: AI Image Describer is a straightforward tool that uses AI to analyze visual content and transform it into precise text. It is designed to help you quickly generate captions, identify objects, and understand scene contexts without manual effort.
landing.faq.what.question: What is AI Image Describer?

landing.footer.brand_description: AI Image Describer is a free online ai image describer focused on turning images into useful text fast. It matches the homepage promise: a free online AI Image Describer that generates descriptions, captions, alt text, image-to-prompt output, and OCR in seconds with no login required. Built for creators, marketers, and developers, ai image describer helps you turn images into text based on what’s actually in the picture. The workflow is simple: upload, choose an output style, and copy results.
landing.footer.tagline: Turn images into useful text, fast.

landing.showcases.cases.1.description: A white Ford SUV with black trim and black rims is parked on a paved road. The car has an "AVIS" license plate on the front grille. It is angled towards the right side of the frame, with its headlights on. The SUV is surrounded by lush green grass and trees. In the background, there is a wooden bridge and more trees, with some buildings visible in the distance. The sky is overcast, and the overall lighting suggests it might be a cloudy day.
landing.showcases.cases.1.title: Case 1
landing.showcases.cases.2.description:
This is a wide-angle shot of a park on a clear day, with a serpentine pond in the foreground. The pond is a deep blue and reflects the trees and sky. The banks of the pond are lined with dark brown mulch and bright green grass. The grass slopes gently upwards, dotted with a few scattered trees.
In the foreground, two trees with pink blossoms frame the scene, their branches reaching into the clear blue sky. The tree on the left is closer to the viewer and has a more expansive canopy of flowers, while the tree on the right is further back but still prominent. Behind the pond, a line of trees with delicate pink and white blossoms creates a soft backdrop, and further in the distance, a dense forest of bare trees stretches across the horizon. The bright sunlight casts shadows on the grass, adding depth and texture to the landscape.
landing.showcases.cases.2.title: Case 2
landing.showcases.cases.3.description: The image shows a white arctic hare sitting in the snow. The hare is facing slightly to the left and its ears are perked up. The background is a blurry white, suggesting a snowy environment. A thin, bare branch is visible to the left of the hare. The hare's fur is thick and white, providing camouflage in its snowy habitat. The overall impression is one of a creature adapted to a cold, wintry landscape.
landing.showcases.cases.3.title: Case 3
landing.showcases.description: See how AI Image Describer understands images or photos
landing.showcases.title: Showcase of AI Image Describer

landing.tool.presets.analyze-art-style.p: Analyze the art style of the image. Identify the medium or technique, stylistic influences, composition, color palette, and any notable visual motifs.
landing.tool.presets.caption-title.label: Caption or Title Generator
landing.tool.presets.caption-title.promp: Generate a catchy caption or copy for the image, and add several appropriate hashtags at the end.
landing.tool.presets.describe-briefly.pr: Briefly describe the content of the image.
landing.tool.presets.describe-detail.pro: Summarize the content of the picture in one sentence, then describe in detail what is in the picture, including objects, people, animals, and the atmosphere and mood of the picture.
landing.tool.presets.describe-person.pro: Provide a detailed description of persons in the image, including their hair style, color, and length, skin tone and any unique features, facial features like eyes, nose, mouth, and expression, body build and posture, and clothing type, style, colors, and accessories. Avoid using sexually suggestive language.
landing.tool.presets.describe-story.prom: Write a creative short story based on the visual elements of this image. Describe the characters, the setting, and the plot inspired by the scene.
landing.tool.presets.extract-text.label: Extract Text from Image
landing.tool.presets.extract-text.prompt: Extract text information from images, trying to maintain the original alignment, line breaks, and other formatting information.
landing.tool.presets.fashion-outfit.prom: Analyze the outfit and fashion style shown in the image in detail. Describe the clothing items, accessories, textures, colors, and the overall style aesthetic.
landing.tool.presets.flux-prompt.label: Flux Prompt
landing.tool.presets.flux-prompt.prompt: Generate a Flux prompt for the image.
landing.tool.presets.general-image-promp: Generate a concise, high-quality general image-generation prompt describing the subject, setting, style, lighting, camera or framing, and mood.
landing.tool.presets.marketing-copy.prom: Generate attractive copy for objects in pictures for marketing or advertising.
landing.tool.presets.midjourney-prompt.p: Generate a Midjourney prompt for the image.
landing.tool.presets.recognize-objects.p: Identify what the object in the picture is and briefly describe it.
landing.tool.presets.stable-diffusion-pr: Generate a Stable Diffusion prompt for the image.
landing.tool.prompt.placeholder: Example: Write short product captions in a friendly tone, highlight key materials and usage scenarios.

photoDescription.faq.description: Everything you need to know about AI photo descriptions.
photoDescription.faq.detail.answer: You choose. The brief preset gives you a one-line caption, the detailed preset describes subjects, setting, colors, and composition, and the caption preset produces a short title plus caption — handy for social posts and metadata.

photoDescription.faq.title: Photo Description FAQ
photoDescription.faq.what.answer: It's an AI tool that looks at a photo and writes a natural-language description of what's in it — subjects, actions, setting, colors, and mood. Use it for alt text, captions, accessibility, and content workflows.
photoDescription.faq.what.question: What is an AI photo description generator?
photoDescription.hero.headline: Describe Any Photo with AI
photoDescription.hero.subheadline: Upload a photo and get a clear, natural description — from quick captions to detailed scene breakdowns, in the language you need.
photoDescription.how.description: Three steps from photo to polished description.
photoDescription.how.steps.copy.text: Copy the description in one click, or export a whole batch as CSV or JSON for alt text and metadata workflows.
photoDescription.how.steps.copy.title: Copy and use
photoDescription.how.steps.detail.text: Choose a brief caption, a detailed scene description, or a title-plus-caption pair for social posts.
photoDescription.how.steps.detail.title: Choose the detail level
photoDescription.how.steps.upload.text: Drag in a JPG, PNG, or WebP — portraits, landscapes, product shots, or everyday snapshots all work.
photoDescription.how.steps.upload.title: Upload your photo
photoDescription.how.title: How to Describe a Photo with AI
photoDescription.meta.description: Free AI photo description generator. Upload any photo and get detailed descriptions, captions, and alt text in seconds. No sign-up required.
photoDescription.meta.title: Photo Description – Free AI Photo Describer | aiimagedescriber.io
photoDescription.tool.description: Upload one photo or a batch and choose how much detail you want — a brief caption or a full scene description.
photoDescription.tool.tip: Tip: use the detailed preset for alt text and accessibility, and the brief preset for quick captions.
photoDescription.tool.title: AI Photo Description Generator
